final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [31:0] limit,
    output reg [31:0] count
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 0;
        end
        else if (count == limit) begin
            count <= 0;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
